construct_verdict_reason: All items measure subjective perceptions of corruption's prevalence, trajectory, or spatial location in Mexico, directly aligned with the construct definition.

items.reason: Measures temporal assessment of corruption trajectory by comparing current prevalence to childhood, directly capturing the 'past' dimension of the construct.
Measures temporal assessment of corruption trajectory by asking about future prevalence in 5 years, directly capturing the 'future' dimension of the construct.
Measures basic perception of corruption existence in Mexico, establishing the foundational prevalence assessment within the construct domain.
Measures spatial attribution of corruption by asking respondents to identify the sector where corruption is most concentrated, directly capturing the 'location' dimension of the construct.
Measures spatial attribution of corruption within government by hierarchical level, providing a refined geographic/organizational location assessment within the construct domain.
